context.route_card:
## Structured Route Card
- Method family: `monte_carlo`
- Instrument type: `american_put`
- Route: `exercise_monte_carlo`
- Engine family: `exercise`
- Required primitives:
  - `trellis.models.processes.gbm.GBM` (state_process)
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.engine.MonteCarloEngine` (path_simulation)
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.lsm.longstaff_schwartz` (exercise_control)
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.tv_regression.tsitsiklis_van_roy` (exercise_control)
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.primal_dual.primal_dual_mc` (exercise_control)
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.stochastic_mesh.stochastic_mesh` (exercise_control)
- Resolved instructions:
  - [historical_note] Use an approved early-exercise control primitive instead of inventing new engine modes.
  - [historical_note] Approved policy classes: `longstaff_schwartz` [implemented], `tsitsiklis_van_roy` [implemented], `primal_dual_mc` [implemented], `stochastic_mesh` [implemented].
  - [historical_note] Implemented today: `longstaff_schwartz`, `tsitsiklis_van_roy`, `primal_dual_mc`, `stochastic_mesh`.
  - [historical_note] Regression basis choice is a continuation-estimator detail, not a required route primitive.
- Required adapters:
  - `derive_exercise_dates_from_schedule_or_time_grid`
  - `build_spot_to_exercise_payoff_callback`
  - `select_continuation_estimator_or_basis`
- Primary modules to inspect/reuse:
  - `trellis.models.monte_carlo.engine`
- Post-build test targets:
  - `tests/test_agent/test_build_loop.py`
- Instruction precedence: follow the approved modules, primitives, and route helper in this card. If older guidance conflicts, treat it as stale and obey this plan.
- Use approved Trellis imports only. Prefer thin adapters over bespoke numerical kernels.
